exam_name: IBM Certified watsonx Generative AI Engineer - Associate

testing_centers.notes: Online proctoring available through Pearson VUE OnVUE; in-person test centers also available

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match exam registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or external resources permitted. Proctor monitors via webcam for online proctored sessions. Assessment exams (unproctored practice tests) are also available via Pearson VUE.
renewal_options: IBM certifications are valid for 2 years. Renew by retaking the current version or a higher-level exam before expiry.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period after a failed attempt. Full exam fee required for each retake.

domains.name: Analyze and Design a Generative AI Solution

official_study_resources.title: IBM Training
official_study_resources.notes: Official IBM instructor-led and self-paced training; study guides and sample tests available per cert page

aliases: ibm certified watsonx generative ai engineer - associate
